zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud of Kilton於大約1210年出生時，她的父親Roger de Kilton35歲，母親Ilger FitzRandolph31歲。她於大約1224年與Robert de Thweng在英國英格蘭越可爾吉爾頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1279年6月享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Kilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place called Kilton in Skelton (North Yorkshire), Somerset, or Worksop (Nottinghamshire). The Yorkshire placename may derive from Old English cild ‘child’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, with change from initial Ch- to K- due to Scandinavian influence. The Somerset place takes its name from Kilve (a nearby place in Somerset, probably named with Old English cylfe ‘hill, eminence’, genitive cylfan) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The origin of the Nottinghamshire placename is uncertain. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud of Kilton was born about 1210, her father, Roger de Kilton, was 35 and her mother, Ilger FitzRandolph, was 31. She married Robert de Thweng about 1224, in Kilton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in June 1279, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud of Kilton est née environ 1210, son père, Roger de Kilton, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ilger FitzRandolph, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Thweng environ 1224, à Kilton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en juin 1279, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud of Kilton um 1210 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Kilton 35 und ihre Mutter Ilger FitzRandolph 31. Sie hat um 1224 in Kilton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Thweng geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb im Juni 1279 im Alter von 70 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud of Kilton è nata il circa 1210, sua padre, Roger de Kilton, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Ilger FitzRandolph, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Thweng circa 1224, nel Kilton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel giugno 1279, all'età di 70 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud of Kilton(이)가 대략 1210년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Kilton(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ilger FitzRandolph(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킬턴에서 Robert de Thweng(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1279년 6월 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud of Kilton родилась около 1210 г., её отцу по имени Roger de Kilton было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ilger FitzRandolph, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Thweng около 1224 г. в местности килтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла июнь 1279 г. в возрасте 70 лет.
